title: +approve -- staff approves a submitted chargen sheet
description: Demonstrates the staff-side approval path. The player is pre-seeded at chargen Stage 6 with a complete Mortal sheet; +cg/submit files a CGEN job, then admin runs +approve which copies the sheet to the live record, closes the job, and mails the player.

steps.note: +cg/submit files a CGEN job in the jobs queue and stores the job number on the chargen state. The live sheet (state.cofd) is NOT created yet.
Idempotency guard: a second /submit while the CGEN job is still 'new' or 'open' is refused so staff aren't spammed with duplicates.

+approve runs as admin: closes the CGEN job, copies the submitted sheet onto the live character record, mails the player, and announces success. Optional notes (after =) are surfaced in both the announcement and the mail.

steps.cmd: +approve Hopeful=Welcome to the chronicle. Watch your touchstones.
steps.label: admin approves

steps.sub: Approval Refused When Nothing Is Pending

steps.note: After approval, the cofd_cg state is cleared and the job is closed; a second +approve has nothing to act on.
+sheet now renders the approved character. The concept, attributes, skills, and merits all carried over from the submission.
